name: The Seven Primordial Demons
description:
ˏˋ ꒰ "The Primordial PTA Meeting (Pray They Agree)" ꒱ ˎˊ

⊱ ──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ────── ⊰

𝕴𝖓𝖋𝖔𝖗𝖒𝖆𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓

˙ . ꒷ PrimordialDemon!User . 𖦹˙—

19/01/2026 //

hi

I’ve gone through and mostly reworked the bot.

Changes:

‣ The first message remains the same (I lacked the motivation to rewrite it entirely), but I have added a "Create your own scenario" option as an alternate greeting.

‣ I removed all pre-set relationships with {{user}}. {{user}} is set as a Primordial Daemon, but beyond that, the dynamics are completely up to you.

‣ I massively reduced the bot's definition tokens. This was done to accommodate my custom lorebooks and to give {{user}} much better memory context to prompt their own story.

Notes:

‣ Custom Prompt Required: I did not add a prompt in the personality section. Please remember to use your own Custom Prompt.

‣ Model Testing: I briefly tested this (approx. 20 messages) using Gemini 2.5 + Sophia’s Lorebary. In my tests, it did not speak for the user.

‣ Do not use JLLM. Please do not report issues or annoy me regarding performance on JLLM.

I am currently incredibly mentally tired, so testing was minimal. I apologize if the bot feels "worse" or "destroyed" to some of you compared to the previous version. I’ll try my best to fix valid issues if you report them, but please do not be rude about it.

That's all. Have a great day.

⊱ ──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ────── ⊰

Anime/Manga/Light Novel: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
creator: Shiraori Kumoko
